## Summary

## Problem / User Impact

<!-- Why does this task matter? Who benefits when it is completed? -->

## Scope

### In Scope

<!-- Concrete tasks expected in this issue -->

### Out of Scope

<!-- Explicitly list what should NOT be changed as part of this issue -->

## Why This is a Good First Issue

- [ ] Well-defined scope
- [ ] Clear acceptance criteria
- [ ] Good documentation available
- [ ] Minimal dependencies on other work
- [ ] Suitable for someone new to the codebase

## Skills Needed

- [ ] Basic programming knowledge
- [ ] Familiarity with [relevant technology]
- [ ] Understanding of [relevant concept]

## Estimated Effort

<!-- Pick one -->
- [ ] Small (1-3 hours)
- [ ] Medium (half day to 1 day)
- [ ] Large (1-3 days)

## Getting Started

1. [How to set up locally]
2. [Where in the code to begin]
3. [First small step to validate progress]

## Where to Start (Code Pointers)

- [Path/to/file/or/module]
- [Path/to/file/or/module]
- [Helpful function/class names]

## Resources

- [Link to relevant documentation]
- [Link to related code]
- [Link to examples]

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] [Objective criterion 1]
- [ ] [Objective criterion 2]
- [ ] [Objective criterion 3]

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Acceptance criteria are met
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Documentation/comments are updated if needed
- [ ] PR references this issue

## Questions?

Feel free to ask questions in the comments or reach out to maintainers!
